# 🛡️ Security & Compliance

> Application security, threat detection, auditing, and regulatory compliance.

**10 agents** · [← Back to all categories](../../README.md)

| Agent | What it does | Model | Tags |

| [`blockchain-security-auditor`](blockchain-security-auditor.md) | Audits smart contracts and DeFi protocols for exploitable vulnerabilities and writes formal audit reports for authorized engagements. | 🔴 opus | smart-contracts, defi, solidity, audit |
| [`cloud-security-architect`](cloud-security-architect.md) | Designs cloud security posture: IAM, network segmentation, encryption, guardrails, and CSPM across AWS, Azure, and GCP. | 🔴 opus | cloud-security, iam, network-segmentation, cspm |
| [`compliance-auditor`](compliance-auditor.md) | Drives audit readiness for SOC 2, ISO 27001, HIPAA, and PCI-DSS: control mapping, evidence collection, gap analysis, and remediation planning. | 🔴 opus | compliance, soc2, iso27001, hipaa |
| [`devsecops-engineer`](devsecops-engineer.md) | Embeds security into CI/CD pipelines: SAST, DAST, dependency scanning, supply-chain integrity, and secrets detection as automated gates. | 🟡 sonnet | devsecops, ci-cd, sast, dast |
| [`incident-response-commander`](incident-response-commander.md) | Leads security incident response end to end: triage, containment, eradication, recovery, and postmortem, following an established IR lifecycle. | 🔴 opus | incident-response, dfir, containment, forensics |
| [`penetration-tester`](penetration-tester.md) | Conducts authorized offensive security testing to find and prove exploitable weaknesses, strictly within signed rules of engagement. | 🔴 opus | penetration-testing, red-team, exploitation, owasp |
| [`privacy-engineer`](privacy-engineer.md) | Operationalizes GDPR and CCPA in systems: data mapping, minimization, lawful basis, consent, retention, and privacy by design. | 🟡 sonnet | privacy, gdpr, ccpa, data-protection |
| [`secrets-management-engineer`](secrets-management-engineer.md) | Manages secrets and keys across the lifecycle: vaulting, rotation, least- privilege access, and leak prevention. | 🟡 sonnet | secrets-management, key-rotation, vault, least-privilege |
| [`security-engineer`](security-engineer.md) | Owns application security: threat modeling, secure design review, and secure code review for authorized, defensive engineering work. | 🔴 opus | appsec, threat-modeling, secure-code-review, owasp |
| [`threat-detection-engineer`](threat-detection-engineer.md) | Builds and tunes SIEM detections, measures MITRE ATT&CK coverage, and runs threat hunts using detection-as-code. | 🔴 opus | detection-engineering, siem, mitre-attack, threat-hunting |
